name: Symptoms showed up weeks after work slip in Ogden—too late?
description: Report promptly with doc proof—delayed OK if connected.[1]

mainEntity.name: Symptoms showed up weeks after work slip in Ogden—too late?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report promptly with doc proof—delayed OK if connected.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, report as soon as symptoms appear if linked to incident.** Utah/Idaho allow claims for delayed injuries with medical proof.[1][4] Doctor must connect via records. Insurers challenge; get MRI/specialist opinion. Don't delay reporting original fall. Attorney fights 'unrelated' denials.
